pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly specify this output path.
setup_task.sh generates the initial Webots world file using these specific contactMaterials strings.
Task description explicitly requests coulombFriction to be 0.002. verifier.py checks that it is <= 0.01.
Task description explicitly requests bounce to be 0.95. verifier.py checks that it is >= 0.90.
Task description explicitly requests bounce to be 0.85. verifier.py checks that it is between 0.80 and 0.89.
Task description establishes this role for the agent.
Task description sets the context as an autonomous air hockey playing robot simulation.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for webots_env configure_air_hockey_dynamics task by confirming that the target Webots world file is synthetically generated from scratch in setup_task.sh. Verified all required physical properties, including the exact contact materials ('puck', 'table', 'wall', 'striker'), the output file path '/home/ga/Desktop/air_hockey_ready.wbt', and target contact property values like 0.002 friction and 0.95 bounce, completely matching the task description and verifier.py criteria.
